text:
I am having any issue in SQL creating table having undefined table as I have already created those tables but still the data unhandle to SQL table and it is not defined. Can anyone help me to resolve this issue? I am having on my personal site https://mesheble.com/

I thought I have a request permission error so I have also checked that 

String[] permissions = {Manifest.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE};
requestPermissions(permissions, REQUEST_CODE); //REQUEST_CODE can be any Integer value


If anybody can help me out I can define more in detail the issue I am having but here is no option to upload screenshots. Please anyone help me out of this issue.
